_comment: P3d round 3 — cross-runtime co-error on commonly-confused gates. Author each golden INDEPENDENTLY from its standard definition (big-endian, q0=MSB, U[out,in], up to global phase).

intents.definition: Rx(pi/2): single-qubit rotation about the X axis by angle theta=pi/2. Standard definition Rx(theta) = exp(-i theta X/2).
iSWAP gate: swaps |01> and |10> with a factor of i; leaves |00>,|11> unchanged. Basis |q0 q1>, index = 2*q0 + q1.
T-dagger (T†): the adjoint/inverse of the T gate. T = diag(1, e^{i pi/4}).
